product_overview: Postulator 3000 is a modular job-application pipeline that scrapes job postings, matches candidate skills with LLM-native matching plus HITL review, generates application documents, and renders final artifacts (PDF/DOCX) via a unified CLI and LangGraph orchestration.
core_goals: Modularize pipeline stages so each module exposes a clear entrypoint and typed IO contracts.
Provide a unified IO layer and workspace layout for artifact storage (DataManager + WorkspaceManager).
Make pipeline orchestration LangGraph-native with graph-level checkpointing and HITL breakpoints.
Ship a single unified CLI that wraps module entrypoints and can invoke LangGraph graphs.
Provide a textual HITL review UI (Textual TUI) wired to the pipeline via MatchBus for review decisions.
Offer deterministic document generation and engine-agnostic rendering (Pandoc + Jinja2 + engines).
Prioritize testability and end-to-end verification (pytest + spritetest/e2e), with clear node behavior rules.

features.name: Unified module entrypoints and CLI
features.description: Each module exposes a clear entrypoint and typed IO; a single CLI (src/cli/main.py) wraps those entrypoints and can invoke LangGraph graphs.
user_flows: CLI: python -m src.cli.main pipeline --config config.yaml -> CLI prints 'Pipeline starting' and returns 0 -> Python: src.graph.build_pipeline_graph() is called by CLI -> LangGraph: await graph.ainvoke() executes and returns success -> CLI prints 'Pipeline completed' and exits 0
CLI: python -m src.cli.main pipeline --config bad_config.yaml -> CLI returns non-zero with error 'invalid config' -> No call to src.graph.build_pipeline_graph() is made

features.name: Standardized Data & Workspace IO
features.description: A single typed DataManager and WorkspaceManager API manages artifact IO using the canonical data layout (data/jobs/{source}/{job_id}/...).
user_flows: Python: DataManager.load_artifact('data/jobs/stepstone/123/nodes/scrape/proposed/jobposting.json') -> Returns parsed JobPosting JSON with schema-v0 validation -> Python: WorkspaceManager.write_file('data/jobs/stepstone/123/nodes/match_skill/proposed/match.json', serialized_json) -> Returns success (write acknowledged)

Python: DataManager.load_artifact('data/jobs/stepstone/unknown/…/artifact.json') -> Raises FileNotFoundError or returns error 'artifact not found' -> Caller handles missing artifact and aborts pipeline

features.name: Scraper with anti-bot resilience and LLM fallback
features.description: Asynchronous scrapers for providers (stepstone, xing, tuberlin) produce JobPosting artifacts and include LLM-based fallback parsing when scraping fails.
user_flows: CLI: python -m src.ai.scraper.main --provider stepstone --job-id 12345 --out data/jobs/stepstone/12345/nodes/scrape/proposed/jobposting.json -> Scraper returns 200 and writes JobPosting JSON to output path -> Python: DataManager.load_artifact('data/jobs/stepstone/12345/nodes/scrape/proposed/jobposting.json') -> Returns JobPosting JSON

CLI: python -m src.ai.scraper.main --provider stepstone --job-id 99999 -> Scraper returns 429 or raises ScrapeError due to bot protection -> Python: src.ai.scraper.fallback_extract_with_llm(raw_html) is invoked -> Returns extracted JobPosting JSON which is then saved by DataManager

features.name: LangGraph-native match_skill subgraph with HITL review
features.description: Run requirement-to-skill matching inside a LangGraph subgraph; persist proposed matches, pause at human_review_node, and resume based on reviewer commands (approve/reject/regenerate).
user_flows: Python: src.ai.match_skill.graph.build_match_skill_graph() -> LangGraph: await graph.ainvoke() executes the subgraph and returns a MatchArtifact persisted to data/jobs/.../nodes/match_skill/proposed/match.json -> CLI: python -m src.review_ui.app --artifact data/jobs/.../nodes/match_skill/proposed/match.json -> MatchReviewApp loads artifact via MatchBus and displays ReviewSurface

Textual TUI: Reviewer issues 'approve' command in MatchReviewApp -> MatchBus sends review decision payload to LangGraph control-plane -> LangGraph node apply_review_decision processes 'approve' and transitions subgraph to generate_documents

Textual TUI: Reviewer issues 'reject' command in MatchReviewApp -> MatchBus sends 'reject' -> LangGraph apply_review_decision records rejection and subgraph terminates with end state (no generate_documents)

features.name: Deterministic document generation (CV, letter, email)
features.description: Generate structured documents from approved matches via LLM chains and typed contracts, producing DocumentDeltas / GeneratedDocuments artifacts for rendering.
user_flows: Python: src.ai.generate_documents.graph.build_default_generate_documents_chain() -> LangChain/LangGraph: await chain.ainvoke() returns GeneratedDocuments artifact saved to data/jobs/.../nodes/generate_documents/approved/generated_documents.json -> Python: DataManager.load_artifact(.../generated_documents.json) -> Returns GeneratedDocuments

Python: src.ai.generate_documents.graph.build_default_generate_documents_chain() invoked with insufficient context -> Chain returns status 'failed' and error payload -> GeneratedDocuments are not produced and pipeline terminates

features.name: Engine-agnostic rendering coordinator (Pandoc + Jinja2) and packaging
features.description: Render CV/letter artifacts into PDF or DOCX via RenderCoordinator using RenderRequest contracts and package final artifacts for delivery.
user_flows: Python: RenderCoordinator.render(RenderRequest{engine:'tex', document:'cv', template:'default', input_path:'data/.../generated_documents.json'}) -> RenderCoordinator returns binary PDF bytes and writes data/jobs/.../nodes/render/approved/cv.pdf via WorkspaceManager -> CLI: python -m src.cli.main package --job data/jobs/... -> Returns packaged artifact path and exit 0

Python: RenderCoordinator.render(RenderRequest{engine:'tex', document:'cv', input_path:'data/.../corrupt_generated_documents.json'}) -> RenderCoordinator returns error 'render failed: pandoc/tex error' -> No package step is executed and pipeline returns failure

features.name: Testing, CI and e2e verification (pytest + spritetest)
features.description: Run unit, integration, and end-to-end tests and capture results for CI; define node behavior rules so Spritetest can assert pipeline correctness.
user_flows: CLI/CI: python -m pytest tests/ -q -> Pytest returns 0 with all tests passing -> CI marks build as green and advances deployment
CLI/CI: python -m pytest tests/ -q -> Pytest returns non-zero with failing tests and stack traces -> CI marks build as failed and posts failing test list for triage

project.name: Postulator 3000
project.description: Modular job application pipeline with LLM-native skill matching, HITL review, and deterministic document rendering

core_frameworks.name: LangGraph
core_frameworks.purpose: Graph-based orchestration with checkpointing and HITL breakpoints

core_frameworks.name: LangChain
core_frameworks.purpose: LLM abstraction and structured output chains

src/ai/scraper/.description: Job portal web scraping with anti-bot resilience and LLM fallbacks

src/ai/match_skill/.description: LangGraph-native requirement matching with HITL review loop

src/ai/generate_documents/.description: LLM document generation (CV, letter, email) from approved matches

src/tools/translator/.description: Multi-language translation pipeline with chunking and retries

src/tools/render/.description: Typed engine-agnostic document rendering (PDF/DOCX via Pandoc + Jinja2)

src/review_ui/.description: Textual TUI for HITL match review
src/review_ui/.bus: MatchBus (bus.py) - bridges TUI to LangGraph + disk

src/core/.description: Core control-plane state and data-plane management

pipeline.edges: START → scrape → translate → extract_bridge → match_skill → generate_documents → render → package → END

match_skill_subgraph.review_routing: Command-based: approve → generate_documents, reject → __end__, regenerate → prepare_regeneration_context

files: test_pipeline_graph.py: Graph compilation and node verification
